## 

Q²M TrimCleaner plastic and interior cleaner is a gentle maintenance product formulated for regular use. It will not discolour or fade any interior trim. This car vinyl cleaner removes dust and light dirt spots in a flash, leaving no residue behind and preparing the surface for Q2M Preserve. Q²M TrimCleaner has light anti-static properties, making it a great everyday addition to your car interior detailing supplies.

Q²M TrimCleaner is a gentle car vinyl cleaner that might be used on all types of trim, including trim protected with quality dressings. It removes dirt and dust leaving a pleasant matte finish and absolutely no residue behind. Q²M TrimCleaner is the perfect solution for everyday use.

Q²M TrimCleaner is the perfect product to remove old interior plastic and trim dressing in order to reapply fresh protection. This car vinyl cleaner leaves behind a ready surface free of any oily residue.

**PRO TIP:**

Q²M TrimCleaner proves to be a perfect everyday maintenance product for interior trim, leaving a matte and factory fresh look.

TIP: Use with the Q²M BaldWipe EVO for a daily wipe on interior trim. Agitate with a brush or Q²M ScrubPad EVO and let dwell on rubber or exterior trim to enhance the cleaning power.

**CONSUMPTION**: 100ml/car

**PH LEVEL**: NEUTRAL

**Size:** 500ml
